title: Send a Google Calendar invite to participants from Monday

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Does anyone succeeded to configure Google Calendar integration to do the following use case :
When a status of an item changes in a Monday board, it automatically creates an invite in Google Calendar and add participants with email adresses that are in a text or an email column ?

I thought that it was possible with the integration or with zapier but I cannot find a way to do it.

Thank you for your help,

Corentin
